description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a camouflage paint scheme, featuring a streamlined fuselage and a low-mounted straight wing configuration. The wings are broad and rectangular, extending out from the lower part of the fuselage, and the tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer with a yellow tip and horizontal stabilizers. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the cockpit is positioned just behind the propeller, likely accommodating a single pilot under an enclosed canopy. The landing gear appears fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The surface finish is matte with a mix of gray, black, and white tones, giving it a military or utilitarian appearance.
description: A small, camouflaged, single-propeller airplane with low-mounted straight wings, a yellow-tipped tail, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the camouflage pattern, low-mounted wings, and yellow-tipped tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose-mounted propeller, forward cockpit, and broad wing span.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the tail section and fixed landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the overall width of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit directly behind the propeller.
